messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The benchmark scores a model's FIRST diff, so it cannot see rework — the thing that actually separates models
What it solves: THE DEFECT. `runTrial` / `runBenchmark` (`extension/src/benchmark/`) execute the provider CLI once
against a fresh fixture copy and score the resulting diff immediately. Nothing routes it through
cleaner -> architect -> hardener -> QA. The harness is therefore structurally incapable of seeing
rewor…
How it works: The diff is put through the pipeline rather than scored where it lands
